channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

item.title: ironcalc/IronCalc
item.description: Main engine of the IronCalc ecosystem

item.title: thewh1teagle/kokoro-onnx
item.description: TTS with kokoro and onnx runtime

item.title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
item.description: Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

item.title: nushell/nushell
item.description: A new type of shell

item.title: exo-explore/exo
item.description: Run your own AI cluster at home with everyday devices 📱💻 🖥️⌚

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: 🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference

item.title: logdyhq/logdy-core
item.description: Realtime log viewer with web UI, tail -f for logs with a web interface browser.

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: torvalds/linux
item.description: Linux kernel source tree

item.title: gtsteffaniak/filebrowser
item.description: 📂 Web File Browser

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 LobeHub - an open-source, modern design AI Agent Workspace. Supports multiple AI providers, Knowledge Base (file upload / RAG ), one click install MCP Marketplace and Artifacts / Thinking. One-click FREE deployment of your private AI Agent application.

item.title: iptv-org/iptv
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: mlc-ai/web-llm
item.description: High-performance In-browser LLM Inference Engine

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases
item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with OpenAI gpt-oss, DeepSeek-R1, Gemma 3 and other models.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.description: A collaborative note taking, wiki and documentation platform that scales. Built with Django and React.

item.description: An ultra-lightweight native Discord client for vintage and modern Mac OS

item.title: wavetermdev/waveterm
item.description: An open-source, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus Agent Tools, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.description: Portable file server with accelerated resumable uploads, dedup, WebDAV, FTP, TFTP, zeroconf, media indexer, thumbnails++ all in one file, no deps

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.description: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn’t sacrifice on its looks.
